topics.topic_en: SDLC Phases and Waterfall vs Iterative Models
topics.topic_ar: مراحل دورة حياة تطوير النظم ومقارنة نموذج الشلال مع النماذج التكرارية
topics.query_en: SDLC phases explained Waterfall vs Iterative models tutorial
topics.query_ar: شرح دورة حياة تطوير النظم SDLC الشلال والتكراري
topics.reason: Students often struggle to differentiate between the rigid sequential phases of traditional models and the overlapping phases of iterative approaches.

topics.topic_en: Agile Methodologies: Scrum Framework and Artifacts
topics.topic_ar: منهجيات أجايل: إطار عمل سكروم والمنتجات
topics.query_en: Agile methodology Scrum framework artifacts explained
topics.query_ar: شرح منهجية أجايل وإطار عمل سكروم Scrum
topics.reason: The conceptual shift from sequential planning to adaptive, sprint-based workflows introduces confusing new terminology and team roles.

topics.topic_en: Systems Acquisition: RFP and Cost-Benefit Analysis

topics.query_ar: الاستحواذ على النظم وتحليل التكلفة والعائد RFP
topics.reason: Evaluating vendor proposals and calculating financial viability requires business analysis and accounting skills that CS students often lack.

topics.topic_en: Enterprise Architecture and Organizational System Development

topics.query_ar: البنية المؤسسية وتطوير النظم في المؤسسات
